analysis: LSDP (Lone Star Downhole Products) is a precision contract manufacturer offering CNC machining, rubber molding, welding/fabrication, and laser engraving, primarily serving downhole (oil & gas) and other industrial customers.

codes.reasoning: The company operates CNC mills and lathes for precision machining, which falls under machining centers and way-type machines.
codes.evidence: Operating out of our new multi-building facility - equipped CNC mills and lathes - we support customers from prototype development through full-scale production.

codes.reasoning: The company explicitly lists CNC lathes as part of their machining capability, directly corresponding to the Lathes FSC code.
CNC mills are listed as core equipment, corresponding to milling machines under FSC 3417.
The company offers in-house welding and fabrication services, which aligns with miscellaneous welding equipment/services.
codes.evidence: In addition to multi-axis CNC machining, we're well known for our in-house rubber molding and welding/fabrication capabilities.

codes.reasoning: The company provides in-house rubber molding, which corresponds to rubber and plastics working machinery/products.
codes.evidence: we're well known for our in-house rubber molding and welding/fabrication capabilities.

codes.group_name: Construction, Mining, Excavating, and Highway Maintenance Equipment
codes.reasoning: The company name references 'Downhole Products' and NAICS codes 332710/332721 indicate precision-machined components for petroleum/downhole applications.
codes.evidence: Lone Star Downhole Products (LSDP) has built a strong reputation across multiple industries for delivering high-quality, precision-machined components.

codes.reasoning: Multi-axis CNC machining for precision components may include machine tool accessories and fixtures as part of their manufacturing scope.
codes.evidence: In addition to multi-axis CNC machining, we're well known for our in-house rubber molding and welding/fabrication capabilities.
